历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 3217 → 3212 → 3316 → 5308 → 9341. Since 2024, the ranking has significantly dropped, mainly due to the Malaysia campus majors lowering the school line in 2025; the minimum ranking for main campus majors is about 4305, showing a declining trend in recent years. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 75 → 71 → 72 → 75 → 77 students, with the 2026 plan at 77 students, unchanged from 2025. However, the 2025 plan included 2 students from the Malaysia campus, while the 2026 plan is entirely for main campus majors, indicating a slight expansion of actual main campus enrollment.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 25th in the 2026 Soft Science main list, with a stable ranking between 24th and 26th in recent years, belonging to a top-tier comprehensive university in China. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', involving campus safety, employment difficulties, and discrimination in re-examination; Douyin popularity ranking is 5th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention; the 2025 admission line abnormal signal indicates continued pressure on enrollment; Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Law A-, Mathematics A-, etc., with outstanding economics, management, and science strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province, not a local university in this province, with no local preference; its enrollment scale in Shanxi is about 77 students, a medium scale; engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Statistics are socially popular; the province's 2026 physics category candidates are 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition; the provincial control line for the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch is 419 points, with little fluctuation in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 9341 (including Malaysia campus), the 2026 plan unchanged but with a higher proportion of main campus majors, a slight decrease in provincial candidates, negative reputation but high Douyin attention, it is expected that the 2026 minimum ranking will slightly move forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 9261, with a range of 8761–9761.
